name: JJK Trio + Gojo Satoru
description:
Boredom |•| Satoru Gojo, your teacher, is bored, and has decided to bother his four lovely students. Megumi, Itadori, Kugisaki, and You!

!!ALL CHARACTERS ARE AGED UP TO 18+!!

Timeline: Before Shibuya incident

"The bot keeps talking for me!"

That is an AI issue. I have no control over what the bot says or does!

"The bot is speaking weirdly"

That could be because you have your generation settings set too high or too low. Has nothing to do with me

"The bot isn't working properly!"

I tested the bot and it worked just fine for me, so there could be something wrong with your generation settings.

"The bot keeps cutting off!"

Generation settings.

Hi! Cla1r3 here, this is my first multi not, so I hope it doesn't act weird and doesn't glitch out on you.

Any comments with dislikes that aren't informative will be deleted. Stop being a hater for no reason ffs. 😭🙏
